rationale: Fixing intermittent GridFS tests that assert timing incorrectly; test maintenance, not driver behavior change.
Deprecating parallelCollectionScan API helpers; ergonomics/API cleanup, no spec rule violated.
Change streams spec requires rename event to include 'to' field; driver was missing this required field.
Updating change stream tests for 4.1.1 drop notifications; child ticket of DRIVERS-504 spec test rollout.
Change stream spec's Resumable Error definition was too broad; root cause in spec, fixed via DRIVERS-650.
BSON size error report; empty description, resolution 'Done' (not Fixed); insufficient detail to classify further.
Creating unnecessary connection instead of reusing channel; implementation inefficiency, no specific retryable-reads spec rule violated.
Resyncing connection string spec tests for percent encoding in userinfo; depends on DRIVERS-349 and SPEC-835.
Resyncing SDAM test corpus to add mixed-case hostname tests; depends on DRIVERS-479/SPEC-915/SPEC-1172.
LINQ FindProjectionTranslator bug: common field-name prefix causes incorrect projection rendering; internal implementation bug, no spec rule.
Wire protocol spec requires driver to raise error when response messageLength exceeds maxMessageSizeBytes; driver missing this check.
Adding serialization convention to map string _id to ObjectId; API ergonomics feature, no spec area involved.
Adding MongoDB 4.2 to Evergreen CI test matrix; CI infrastructure, no driver behavior or spec involved.
User-reported Windows socket exhaustion under stress test; environmental resource issue, no spec rule violated.
Connection string spec requires URI percent-encoding for username/password; driver was not encoding credentials properly.
Server selection spec (SPEC-1292) says don't send $readPreference to standalone servers; driver was sending it.
SCRAM spec requires caching ClientKey to avoid expensive recomputation; coordinated via DRIVERS-343 across all drivers.
Updating tests after server removed 'ns' field from index definitions; test adaptation to server change.
Regression in 2.9.0: mongodb+srv connection strings fail; dns-seedlist discovery broken, was working in 2.8.1.
User-reported UpdateOneAsync with ArrayFilters returning 0 counts; resolution 'Done', likely user error or config issue.
User-reported connection timeout with misconfigured replica set; resolution 'Done', environmental/configuration issue.
User-reported aggregate timeout vs. Robo3T; performance/query issue, resolution 'Done', no spec rule involved.
User-reported server selection timeout in non-production environments; environmental/configuration issue, resolution 'Done'.
Duplicate of CSHARP-2686; aggregate performance issue, resolution 'Done', no spec rule involved.
Race condition in FLE corpus test execution; intermittent test infrastructure bug, resolution 'Done' not Fixed.
User-reported BsonSerializationException for C# Claim type; serialization configuration issue, resolution 'Done'.
Performance benchmark comparing C# driver to pymongo; performance tuning, no spec rule involved.
Investigating inability to load mongocrypt.dll and find mongocryptd in Evergreen CI; CI environment setup issue.
LINQ nested filter generates wrong query (missing Books path level); internal LINQ translation bug, no spec rule.
Build script broken by .NET Core 3.0 release; CI infrastructure fix, no driver behavior change.
CompressorConfiguration missing Equals causes spurious cluster creation; internal implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Anonymous projection bug with common field-name prefix (regression from 2.9.1); internal LINQ translator bug, no spec rule.
Fixing error message in the command monitoring spec test runner; test infrastructure maintenance.
Snappy compression header format wrong; server rejects messages as 'invalid or corrupted', violating wire compression spec.
Updating sharded transaction tests to avoid snapshot readConcern; child of DRIVERS-735 spec test update.
LINQ nested Any() throws NotSupportedException regression from 2.8.0; internal LINQ translation bug, no spec rule.
LINQ projection fails to translate decimal.ToString(); internal LINQ translation limitation, no spec rule violated.
IdGenerator fails after OfType on collection; internal serialization/LINQ interaction bug, no spec rule involved.
Driver leaks credentials into exception messages; security practice issue, no specific spec rule mandates redaction.
Adding ISupportInitialize support for .NET Standard 1.5; platform compatibility feature, no spec area involved.
Cursor iteration behavior when closed from another thread; edge case, cannot name specific cursor spec rule violated.
Sessions spec requires discarding ServerSessions after network errors; driver was reusing potentially tainted sessions. DRIVERS-649.
mongocryptd launch timing race causes second server selection timeout; implementation timing issue, cannot name specific FLE spec rule.
Nested .Any() LINQ generates wrong query shape regression from 2.8.0; internal LINQ translator bug, no spec rule violated.
Implementing FLE GA spec changes per DRIVERS-698; Improvement type, driver was conformant to prior spec version.
Sessions spec (SPEC-1019) prohibits unacknowledged writes with explicit sessions; driver was allowing this combination.
ImmutableTypeClassMapConvention incorrectly includes static properties via GetProperties; internal serialization convention bug.
Implementing new spec behavior for client-side errors in transactions (SPEC-1195); Improvement, driver was not previously wrong.
Typo fix in WithTransaction C# documentation; docs-only change, no driver behavior involved.
SSL connection code example in docs is incomplete/misleading; documentation issue, no spec rule violated.
